pull.title: Avoid `-Wmaybe-uninitialized` when compiling with `gcc -O1`
pull.body:
Fixes https://github.com/bitcoin-core/secp256k1/issues/1361.

CI tasks have been adjusted to catch similar issues in the future.

repo.name: secp256k1
repo.description: Optimized C library for EC operations on curve secp256k1

repo.name: secp256k1
repo.description: Optimized C library for EC operations on curve secp256k1
